backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a fashion e-commerce backend with product catalog (add, search, filter by category) and order management (place, retrieve, update status) using in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three profile-page features (Profile route, My Orders section, Header profile link) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes (backgrounds, borders, charts, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jade app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining the route tree with a root layout (CartProvider + Layout) and child routes for landing, catalog, order tracking, order confirmation, and the /profile page.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Slide-in cart sidebar component displaying cart items with quantity controls, order total, and a place-order flow that navigates to the confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A conversational chat widget that guides users through style, occasion, and color preferences to suggest outfit combinations from the product catalog. Manages a multi-step conversation flow and renders product suggestions with navigation to the catalog.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, cart icon, profile button, and Internet Identity login/logout via a dropdown menu. Handles category-filtered navigation to the catalog page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, main content area, footer with a caffeine.ai attribution, CartSidebar, and ChatWidget into a full-page flex layout.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusTimel: Displays a horizontal step-by-step timeline of order statuses (Processing, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered) with animated progress line and icon styling based on the current status.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, category badge, name, price, and an add-to-cart button that shows a brief confirmation state. Maps IC-hosted image URLs to local asset fallbacks by category.
frontend/src/components/ThreeDScene.tsx: A React Three Fiber 3D scene featuring animated floating diamond and ring meshes, a particle field, and a mouse-tracking camera rig, used as a decorative hero background.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state management with add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations, plus open/close state for the cart sidebar and computed totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatHistory.ts: Manages chat message state for a style advisor chatbot, providing functions to add messages and reset the conversation to the initial welcome message.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching products by category/search, placing orders, retrieving order status, and initializing product data.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles for the Jade luxury fashion app, including a dark-mode OKLCH color palette with gold accents, Playfair Display/Inter font imports, and custom utility classes for luxury UI effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Product catalog page with category filtering, debounced search, and URL-driven highlight/category params, displaying products in a grid with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Hero landing page featuring a lazy-loaded 3D scene, animated text reveal, and navigation buttons to the catalog and order tracking pages, with product initialization on mount.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays a post-purchase confirmation screen showing the order ID with options to track the order or continue shopping. Redirects to home if no orderId is present in the URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Provides a standalone order tracking page where users enter a numeric order ID to fetch and display order details, item list with images, and a status timeline component.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile page combining Internet Identity login/logout UI with an order lookup tool; shows user principal, authentication status, and order details with status timeline when logged in.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), brand color tokens (gold, charcoal, cream), custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 9) for the 'Jade' e-commerce clothing brand, listing existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and planned additions like Internet Identity auth and multiple payment options.
